016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.bitcoind;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
019import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.RpcConfig;
020import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.RpcURI;
021
022import java.net.URI;
023import java.net.URISyntaxException;
024import java.util.HashMap;
025
026/**
027 * Bitcoin configuration from bitcoin.conf
028 * First cut is just a map, but future versions may be strongly typed
029 */
030public class BitcoinConf extends HashMap<String, String> {
031    public final String rpcconnect = "rpconnect";
032    public final String rpcport = "rpcport";
033    public final String RPCCONNECT_DEFAULT = "localhost";
034    public final String RPCPORT_DEFAULT = Integer.toString(RpcURI.RPCPORT_MAINNET);
035
036    /**
037     *  Create a BitcoinConf with a default RPCConfig configuration.
038     */
039    public BitcoinConf() {
040        super();
041        this.put(rpcconnect, RPCCONNECT_DEFAULT);
042        this.put(rpcport, RPCPORT_DEFAULT);
043    }
044
045    public RpcConfig getRPCConfig() {
046        URI uri;
047        try {
048            uri = new URI("http://" + get(rpcconnect) + ":" + get(rpcport));
049        } catch (URISyntaxException e) {
050            uri = RpcURI.getDefaultMainNetURI(); // TODO: Throw exception on failure, rather than fall back to default
051        }
052        String netWorkId = getNetworkId();
053
054        RpcConfig config = new RpcConfig(netWorkId, uri, get("rpcuser"), get("rpcpassword"));
055        return config;
056    }
057
058    private String getNetworkId() {
059        String isTestNetString = get("testnet");
060        String isRegTestString = get("regtest");
061        boolean isTestNet = (isTestNetString != null && isTestNetString.equals("1"));
062        boolean isRegTest = (isRegTestString != null && isRegTestString.equals("1"));
063
064        if (isRegTest && isTestNet) {
065            throw new RuntimeException("Invalid config file, both 'testnet' and 'regtest' are set!");
066        }
067
068        if (isRegTest) {
069            return BitcoinNetwork.ID_REGTEST;
070        } else if (isTestNet) {
071            return BitcoinNetwork.ID_TESTNET;
072        } else {
073            return BitcoinNetwork.ID_MAINNET;
074        }
075    }
076}
